property.name: pageSize
property.label: Enter default page size
property.description: Enter how many records you want to display on page. Default value is 10

property.name: noSearchResultFoundMsg
property.label: No result found message
property.description: Enter message to show when no matching result is found for the search term.

property.name: defaultFilterCollapse
property.label: Collapse Search Filters
property.description: Check this box to collapse the search filter. Default is OPEN.

property.name: activelistview
property.label: Display list view
property.description: Check this box for list view or uncheck for grid view. Default is list view

property.name: emptySearchString
property.default: Run a query to generate a response.
property.label: SU GPT Empty SearchString
